metadata.changes:
Change 1: Replace:
  if p == "operator":
              return f"{obj} operated {subj}"
with:
  if p == "operator":
              return f"{subj} was operated by {obj}"
Change 2: Replace:
  if p == "status":
              # Keep original casing, ensure proper article if needed
              return f"{subj} is {obj.lower()}"
with:
  if p == "status":
              # Adjust phrasing for common statuses
              low = obj.lower()
              if low in {"retired", "retiree"}:
                  return f"{subj} is a retired"
              return f"{subj} is {low}"
